# Reporium

Reporium is a GitHub knowledge library that enriches and visualizes public repos for any GitHub username.

## API
GET /api/repos/{username}
Returns enriched JSON with all public repos, tags, stats, and metadata for any GitHub username.
No authentication required. Rate limited by GitHub API (60/hour unauthenticated).

## Live Example
https://reporium.com/api/repos/perditioinc

## Data Shape
See TypeScript types at: https://github.com/perditioinc/reporium/blob/main/src/types/repo.ts
